_comment: SLICE_S1_CONTRACT.md §1c — the canonical registry of server-emitted message keys, published beside contracts/openapi.v0.json. S1 seeds exactly the substrate set. i18n-lint extends (guarded activation, S0 pattern): every manifest key must exist x4 locales in each client catalog once client catalogs exist.

keys.consumer: LimitReached.message_key — the one 429 deny surface (10A / DR-7.3)
Problem.message_key — the one generic error shape (token law 2)
Problem.message_key — reserved substrate key per SLICE_S1_CONTRACT.md §1c
Problem.message_key — POST /v1/signup/complete, ONE wire shape for BOTH the 18-and-13 minor floors (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c/§1g/§12 item 7)

Problem.message_key — POST /v1/signup/complete, HandleRules validation failure (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c; the granular HandleRules reason — invalid_length/invalid_charset/confusable_rejected — stays an internal detail, never on the wire)

Problem.message_key — POST /v1/signup/email-verification/confirm, POST /v1/signup/complete (invalid verifiedToken), POST /v1/auth/session — reused across the whole challenge/verifiedToken credential surface (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c)
IEmailSender template — anti-enumeration mail sent instead of a code when a signup email already owns an account (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c/§1d)
IEmailSender template — anti-enumeration mail sent instead of a code when a signup email already owns an account (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c/§1d)
IEmailSender template — category-8 security notice on refresh-token reuse detection (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1b/§1d/§7)
IEmailSender template — category-8 security notice on refresh-token reuse detection (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1b/§1d/§7)
IEmailSender template — POST /v1/me/email/confirm, sent to the OLD address (the account-takeover tripwire in passwordless auth, SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c/§1d/§7)
IEmailSender template — POST /v1/me/email/confirm, sent to the OLD address (the account-takeover tripwire in passwordless auth, SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1c/§1d/§7)
IEmailSender template — the data-export-ready notification (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1d/§6b/§7), sent by Svac.Identity.Export.ExportWorker when a requested export reaches state=ready
IEmailSender template — the data-export-ready notification (SLICE_S3_CONTRACT.md §1d/§6b/§7), sent by Svac.Identity.Export.ExportWorker when a requested export reaches state=ready
